title: achillea erba-rotta subsp. olympica
intro: Achillea erba-rotta subsp. olympica is a subspecies of the Yarrow plant, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Greece and Turkey. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Achillea erba-rotta subsp. olympica include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and easing cold and flu symptoms, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
